ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the telecommunications provider */,
  "dba_name" TEXT /* Doing Business As name for the provider */,
  "holding_company_name" TEXT /* Name of the holding company that owns the provider */,
  "hoco_num" INTEGER /* Holding Company Number */,
  "hoco_final" TEXT /* Final status of the holding company */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state in which the provider operates */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the provider is currently active */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for contacting the provider */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the provider's website */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the provider was established */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the provider's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_providers_holding_company_name FOREIGN KEY ("holding_company_name") REFERENCES holding_companies ("hoco_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "geoid" TEXT /* Geographical identifier for the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "median_home_value" INTEGER /* Median home value in the neighborhood */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the neighborhood's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider offering the service */,
  "block_code" TEXT /* Block code associated with the service area */,
  "tech_code" INTEGER /* Technology code indicating the service type */,
  "consumer" INTEGER /* Consumer engagement metric */,
  "max_ad_down" REAL /* Maximum advertised download speed */,
  "max_ad_up" REAL /* Maximum advertised upload speed */,
  "service_start_date" TEXT /* Date the service was first offered */,
  "service_end_date" TEXT /* Date the service was discontinued (if applicable) */,
  "is_unlimited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service is unlimited */,
  "price_per_month" REAL /* Monthly price for the service */,
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service type (foreign key to `service_types` table) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the service information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_service_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_type_id") REFERENCES service_types ("service_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_block_code FOREIGN KEY ("block_code") REFERENCES block_codes ("block_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_tech_code FOREIGN KEY ("tech_code") REFERENCES technology_codes ("tech_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumer_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service related to the engagement */,
  "subscription_count" INTEGER /* Number of subscriptions for the service */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date the engagement record was created */,
  "churn_rate" REAL /* Churn rate for the service */,
  "satisfaction_score" INTEGER /* Consumer satisfaction score */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the engagement record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumer_engagement_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_abbreviations" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the state abbreviation record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_codes" (
  "block_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block code */,
  "block_code" TEXT /* Block code used in service area identification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the block code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the block */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the block in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the block code information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technology_codes" (
  "tech_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology code */,
  "tech_code" TEXT /* Technology code used for categorizing service technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the technology code information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holding_companies" (
  "hoco_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding company */,
  "hoco_name" TEXT /* Name of the holding company */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the holding company was established */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for contacting the holding company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the holding company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the holding company information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hoco_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider being evaluated */,
  "average_download_speed" REAL /* Average download speed offered */,
  "average_upload_speed" REAL /* Average upload speed offered */,
  "consumer_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Consumer satisfaction rating */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "latency" REAL /* Average latency in milliseconds */,
  "uptime" REAL /* Uptime percentage */,
  "complaints" INTEGER /* Number of complaints received */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the performance record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_performance_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Name of the service type (e.g., DSL, Fiber) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the service type information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, regulator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the role information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the user information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
